parameters.query:
WITH picked AS (
  SELECT l.lead_id, l.business_name, l.normalized_business_name, l.category,
         l.city, l.region, l.postcode, l.country,
         l.phone_raw, l.email, l.email_status,
         l.website_url_found, l.reviews_rating, l.reviews_count,
         wp.slug AS demo_slug,
         wp.preview_url AS demo_preview_url,
         wp.copy_json AS demo_copy
  FROM bridge.leads l
  LEFT JOIN bridge.website_projects wp ON wp.lead_id = l.lead_id
     AND wp.deployment_status = 'live'
  WHERE l.website_status = 'Ready for Marketing'
    AND l.marketing_status = 'Queued'
    AND l.archived_flag = FALSE
  ORDER BY l.updated_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE OF l SKIP LOCKED
),
advanced AS (
  UPDATE bridge.leads
  SET marketing_status = 'Sending',
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE lead_id IN (SELECT lead_id FROM picked)
  RETURNING lead_id
)
SELECT p.* FROM picked p;

WITH p AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d)
INSERT INTO bridge.outreach_messages
  (lead_id, channel, direction, template_key, subject, body,
   provider_message_id, thread_id, delivery_status, sent_at)
SELECT
  (d->>'lead_id')::uuid,
  'email',
  'outbound',
  COALESCE(d->>'template_key', 'initial_email_v1'),
  d->>'subject',
  d->>'body',
  d->>'provider_message_id',
  d->>'thread_id',
  CASE WHEN (d->>'send_ok')::boolean THEN 'sent' ELSE 'failed' END,
  CASE WHEN (d->>'send_ok')::boolean THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END
FROM p
RETURNING message_id, delivery_status;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({lead_id: $json.lead_id, template_key: 'initial_email_v1', subject: $json.subject, body: $json.body, provider_message_id: $json.provider_message_id, thread_id: $json.thread_id, send_ok: $json.send_ok}) }}

parameters.query:
WITH p AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d)
UPDATE bridge.leads
SET marketing_status = CASE
      WHEN (d->>'send_ok')::boolean THEN 'Awaiting Reply'
      ELSE 'Queued'   -- retry-able
    END,
    updated_at = NOW()
FROM p
WHERE lead_id = (d->>'lead_id')::uuid
RETURNING lead_id, marketing_status, business_name;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({lead_id: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.lead_id, send_ok: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.send_ok}) }}

parameters.query:
WITH p AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d)
INSERT INTO bridge.expenses
  (workflow_name, lead_id, category, vendor, description, units, unit_label, amount_usd, details_json)
SELECT
  'marketing', (d->>'lead_id')::uuid, 'llm_tokens', 'anthropic_haiku',
  'HAIKU outreach email generation for '||(d->>'business_name'),
  1, 'calls',
  CAST(d->>'llm_cost_usd' AS NUMERIC(10,4)),
  (d->'llm_meta')::jsonb
FROM p
RETURNING expense_id, amount_usd;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({lead_id: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.lead_id, business_name: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.business_name, llm_cost_usd: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.llm_cost_usd, llm_meta: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.llm_meta}) }}

parameters.query:
WITH p AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d)
INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events
  (lead_id, workflow_name, event_type, old_status, new_status, details_json)
SELECT
  (d->>'lead_id')::uuid, 'marketing',
  CASE WHEN (d->>'send_ok')::boolean THEN 'email_sent' ELSE 'email_failed' END,
  'Queued',
  CASE WHEN (d->>'send_ok')::boolean THEN 'Awaiting Reply' ELSE 'Queued' END,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'channel', 'email',
    'subject', d->>'subject',
    'to_email', d->>'to_email',
    'dry_run', (d->>'dry_run')::boolean,
    'provider_message_id', d->>'provider_message_id',
    'thread_id', d->>'thread_id',
    'llm_cost_usd', d->>'llm_cost_usd'
  )
FROM p
RETURNING event_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({lead_id: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.lead_id, subject: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.subject, to_email: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.to_email, dry_run: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.dry_run, provider_message_id: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.provider_message_id, thread_id: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.thread_id, send_ok: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.send_ok, llm_cost_usd: $('Parse Gmail send').first().json.llm_cost_usd}) }}
